# REQ-SYS-058: TPMS shall report pressure within ±0.05 bar accuracy

## ASIL Level
A

## Description
TPMS shall report pressure within ±0.05 bar accuracy.

## Rationale
ISO 26262-3:2018, clause 5-5.4.2 — safety goal SG-TP-01 requires timely functional safety response.

## Verification Method
Back-to-back test comparing sensor input vs. actuator output.

## Traceability
- Up: REQ-SYS-057 (system_requirement)
- Down: TC-019-SW (software_test)
